creator: mikhail.rokhin@gmail.com
text:
Was time-out in installation. All works. Thanks.

(In reply to mikhail.rokhin from comment #5)
> After update still fails:
> 
> root@localhost:~ # llvm-lit34 --help
> Traceback (most recent call last):
>   File "/usr/local/bin/llvm-lit34", line 4, in <module>
>     import lit34
>   File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/lit34/__init__.py", line 4,
> in <module>
>     from .main import main
>   File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/lit34/main.py", line 13, in
> <module>
>     import lit34.LitConfig
>   File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/lit34/LitConfig.py", line 7,
> in <module>
>     import lit34.formats
> ImportError: No module named formats
